news.t: Here's Where This Fund Manager Says You Should Look for Stock-Market Bargains
GMO Launches GMO Dynamic Allocation ETF (GMOD)

overview.description: The GMO Dynamic Allocation ETF (GMOD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF that adjusts allocations among global equities, fixed income, and alternative assets in response to GMOs valuation forecasts and market conditions. GMOD was launched on Oct 13, 2025 and is issued by GMO.

data.title: Here's Where This Fund Manager Says You Should Look for Stock-Market Bargains
data.text: Last week's action in stocks illustrated investor worries about high valuations. Those worries are reasons for restraint, a fund manager told Investopedia, but not alarm.

data.title: GMO Launches GMO Dynamic Allocation ETF (GMOD)
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--GMO launches GMO Dynamic Allocation ETF (GMOD). This marks the first time GMO has offered one of its multi-asset class strategies in an ETF.
